hero.label: Physiotherapist — Rhode-Saint-Genèse
hero.tagline: The art of precision, the expertise of care.

experience.title: The BELTRA Experience
experience.subtitle: The technical mastery of your body
experience.intro: Born from excellence training at the Swiss border, the BELTRA method reinvents physiotherapy as one reinvents haute horlogerie: with precision, depth and an absolute demand for results.

blocks.title: A high-precision diagnosis
blocks.text: Like an engineer inspecting every component before intervening, we identify your real limitations — physical, neurological and emotional — before any treatment.

blocks.title: Advanced protocols
blocks.text: Deep tissue, IASTM, vacuum therapy, targeted joint mobilisations. Precision tools in service of complete and lasting recovery.

blocks.title: The Performance vision
blocks.text: The goal is not simply to eliminate pain. It is to optimise your physical capital so your body functions at its full potential — durably.

about.title: Who am I?
about.lead: I designed Zowe with a clear vision: to transform the physiotherapy session into a high-precision experience.
about.paragraph1: My approach doesn't stop at the disappearance of pain — it aims for the lasting optimisation of your physical capital.
about.paragraph2: To reach this level of excellence, I specifically trained in the BELTRA method. This expertise allows me to integrate advanced care protocols into my practice, focused on technical control and deep re-harmonisation of the body.
about.paragraph3: Every patient is unique, and I put my expertise and this specialisation at the service of a bespoke care journey, where scientific rigour meets the comfort of exclusive treatment.

services.title: Protocols & Investments
services.intro: Three levels of intervention, one goal: the excellence of your physical capital.

tiers.name: The Precision Audit
tiers.description: A complete and rigorous diagnosis of your physical capital. We identify together your real limitations, your tension zones and the deep origins of your pain.
tiers.ideal: First consultation or assessment before any BELTRA protocol.

tiers.name: The Harmonie Protocol
tiers.description: A targeted intervention, personalised according to your specific needs. Upper or lower body, according to your situation and current goals.
tiers.ideal: Regular follow-up, sports recovery, localised pain.

tiers.name: The Signature Experience
tiers.description: The BELTRA experience in its entirety. A global treatment of the body, nervous system and emotions. The complete reset your body is longing for.
tiers.ideal: Chronic conditions, intensive recovery, complete optimisation of physical capital.

items.question: Is BELTRA care reimbursed by my health insurance?
items.answer: As a non-contracted physiotherapist, BELTRA treatments are not reimbursed under INAMI rates. However, many health insurers offer partial reimbursements through supplementary insurance. Check directly with your insurance provider.

items.question: Why did you choose non-contracted status?
items.answer: Non-contracted status allows me to offer sessions without imposed time constraints, with advanced protocols that require a duration and quality of intervention incompatible with contracted rates. It is a deliberate choice in favour of excellence in care.

items.question: How does the BELTRA Experience differ from a standard session?
items.answer: A standard session generally treats the symptom. The BELTRA Experience treats the cause. We integrate postural assessment, tension chains, the nervous system and emotional dimensions of the body — elements rarely addressed in traditional physiotherapy.

items.question: Who are BELTRA protocols designed for?
items.answer: For anyone seeking a premium approach to their physical health: an athlete in recovery, a patient with years of chronic pain, or simply looking for a complete reset — BELTRA protocols adapt to your profile.

items.question: How many sessions are needed?
items.answer: The Precision Audit is the recommended starting point. Together we establish a bespoke protocol. For chronic pain, 3 to 5 sessions generally lead to significant and lasting improvement.

items.question: How should I prepare for a session?
items.answer: Come comfortably dressed, ideally in underwear or light sportswear. Avoid a heavy meal in the hour before the session. Above all, come with your questions — listening is an integral part of the protocol.

items.question: Can I give a session as a gift?
items.answer: Absolutely. A BELTRA session is a rare and memorable gift. Contact me directly via the form or by phone for gift card details.

contact.intro: A few details are enough to begin the journey. I will confirm your appointment as soon as possible.
